title: Match .c files in Makefile
body:
Ensure that rebuilds happen when .c files are updated in the source tree.

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

If you edit, say ```libpod/lock/shm/shm_lock.c``` and then run ```make podman``` nothing happens, as the Makefile doens't match ```.c``` files currently

#### How to verify it

Edit a C file and make

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None
